description: Verified header links for Home, Blog, Portfolio, Videos, and Contact sections using a mobile viewport. While most links function correctly, the 'Videos' and 'Contact' links contain typos ('/vidoes' and '/contcat') that lead to 404 errors depending on the current page.

issues.name: Misspelled Header Link Targets
issues.description: Expected: Header links should consistently point to / /blog /portfolio /videos /contact. Actual: The 'Videos' and 'Contact' links in the header contain typos ('/vidoes' and '/contcat') depending on the page. On Home, 'Videos' is '/vidoes'. On the resulting 404 page, 'Videos' is fixed but 'Contact' is now '/contcat'. This prevents navigation to those sections.
reproductionSteps: Observe the 'Videos' link points to '/vidoes'. Click it. Observe it leads to a 404 page.
On the 404 page, observe the 'Contact' link points to '/contcat'. Click it. Observe it leads to a 404 page.
issues.expectedBehavior: Header links should consistently point to / /blog /portfolio /videos /contact.
issues.actualBehavior: The 'Videos' and 'Contact' links in the header contain typos ('/vidoes' and '/contcat') depending on the page. On Home, 'Videos' is '/vidoes'. On the resulting 404 page, 'Videos' is fixed but 'Contact' is now '/contcat'. This prevents navigation to those sections.
